title: 空中课堂 | GOB平台Steve Kim：Launchpad这么火，韩国公链怎么玩？
content_text:
4月8日晚，猎云财经空中课堂第三十四期邀请到韩国公链GOB副董事长Steve Kim作为主讲人带来了新一期的线上分享。本次活动还特别邀请了BitBlock Capital顾问Tom Ku作为主持人。
Steve Kim，成均馆大学
密码学
博士，曾就职于现代汽车、三星S1、德勤咨询，担任大数据分析和区块链ICT与安全专家超过20年，并负责该领域众多大型项目。同时，他还担任首尔网络大学密码学的兼职教授。
Tom Ku，
区块链
投资专家、哥伦比亚大学MBA。曾就职于Ernst & Young担任金融顾问。曾创办MBA咨询与区块链KOL平台TomKu Video两家企业。他具备丰富的区块链项目商业模式咨询与投资经验。
以下为分享实录（经编辑整理）：
01
GOB平台是下一代区块链平台
Tom Ku：请介绍一下你自己以及GOB项目。
Tom Ku：Please introduce your CEO (Mr. Albert Kwon) and GOB.
Steve Kim：我是IT和信息安全专家，拥有成均馆大学信息安全和计算机科学硕士和博士学位。 在现代集团和三星集团担任IT和信息安全专家约20年。此外，我还获得了IT领域的各种认证，如CISA，CISSP，CISM，ITIL，PMP，ISO 27001，9001，22301和20000。
Steve Kim：I was the first generation of ICT in Korea, and established Internet portals such as Korea's portal site, Interpark Technology, and became an IPO and M & A expert.
我还是KISA（韩国互联网和安全局）、NIA（国家信息社会机构）、韩国中小医院协会、韩国中小护理协会的信息安全顾问。我的主要项目包括沙特ARAMCO、科威特KNPC、新加坡樟宜机场等海外项目。目前，我积极投身区块链项目，在区块链研究所GeoBlueLab的工作包括咨询、讲座和论文。
In addition, we are working as a management specialist who accumulates various M & A experiences through many projects such as construction, service, and IT.
GOB平台是下一代区块链平台，旨在解决区块链平台之间服务和数据集成的困境，并提供了可以作为平台使用的生态系统。
GOB platform is the next-generation Blockchain platform that solves the dilemma of data integration and services between Blockchain platforms and provides an ecosystem that can be used as one platform.
GOB平台有两个可以将现有的区块链技术适用于现实世界的关键功能。
GOB Platform provides two key functions to transform the existing blockchain technology to be applicable in the real world.
首先，GOB主网是适应W3C数据标准的下一代区块链，拥有出色的传输速度，为
dApp
用户提供自动化工具和引擎，帮助他们轻松使用区块链。
First, we provide GOB Mainnet, the next generation bockchain accomodating W3C data standard with exceptional transfer speed and providing automated tools and engines for dApp users to easily use the blockchain.
其次，我们提供一个集成的通用区块链中心，可以在不同的区块链平台之间交换数据，也可以在各种服务中实现。
Second, we provide an integrated universal Blockchain Hub that can exchange data among different blockchain platforms, which can be implemented in various services.
02
GOB平台的最终目标
Tom Ku：你对GOB的期许是什么？你的想法来自于何处？
Tom Ku：So Steve, what was the motive for GOB?How did you come up with the idea?
Steve Kim：自区块链技术出现以来，许多个人和公司对其未来感兴趣。 但是开发区块链和主网络绝非易事。
Steve Kim：Ever since the introduction of blockchain technology, many companies and individuals have interest in the future of the blockchain. But many realize that developing a blockchain and mainnet is never easy.
设计区块链网络，上币，运行测试网络以及完成主网的开发存在很多障碍。
There are so many barriers to designing blockchain networks, listing coins, running testnet, and completing the development of the Mainnet.
客户可以购买他们已经创建的区块链平台，并对其定制化以适应其在公共或私有链中的使用，并购买定制的区块链平台来运行他们自己的“dApp商店”。 这是GOB区块链平台的最终目标。
Clients can purchase the blockchain platform that they have already created, and customize to fit its use in public or private blockchain, and purchase a customized blockchain platform to run their own 'dApp store'. This is the ultimate goal of the GOB blockchain platform.
Tom Ku：基于区块链的便捷开发是未来dApp的解决方案。
Tom Ku：Yeah, I agree. Easy creation of blockchain as a software and plug-and-play solutions for dApps are the future.
03
GOB平台的三大特征
Tom Ku：市场上存在有许多类似的平台，您认为GOB的三大主要差异因素是什么？
Tom Ku：However, Steve, there are a number of similar platforms being developed. Having said this, what do you think are the THREE major differentiation factors of GOB?
Steve Kim：GOB平台有三大特征，主网支持SDK、GOB-Portal和GOB Ledger。
Steve Kim：There are three main features of the GOB platform. Main net release supporting SDK、GOB-Portal and GOB-Ledger.
1)GOB 主网上线
1) GOB - Main net release
GOB主网是一个独立的区块链平台，通过丰富的平台配套体系支持用户构建准确的仪表盘，进行交易与建立可扩展的dApp生态。
GOB Mainnet is an independent block-chain platform that enables you to build accurate dashboards and transactions and build scalable dApp ecosystems with a variety of platform-provided features.
GOB DEV Center开发并分发SDKs以构建基础开发环境，以供开发者开发各自的dApp. DApp开发者与终端用户通过使用与获取通证，发展整体生态系统。
The GOB DEV Center develops and distributes SDKs to provide the environment for dApp creators to develop their own dApp. DApp developers and end users co-exist and grow their ecosystem through the consumption and acquisition of coins.
2)GOB Portal
2)GOB-Portal
dApp开发者与用户可以在GOB Portal网站上进行交互。
On the GOB-Portal website, the interaction between dApp developers and users takes place.
GOB Portal提供SDK与API以支持开发者便捷快速地开发dApp。平台配有dApp开发的基本组件与模版，用户可通过自动化工具创建dApp模版，模版可存储于存储库中共享，使用的用户越多，则开发者可获得通证越多。
It provides SDK and API to easily develop dApp, creates template of dApp using wigwig tool directly on the web, and the created template form is stored in the repository and shared, and the more users, the bigger reward is given.
3)GOB Ledger
3)GOB-Ledger
许多企业开始认识到区块链的优势，并尝试引入区块链与业务相结合。但由于区块链技术本身的高壁垒导致其对于是否进入该市场显得犹豫。
Many companies are aware of the advantages of a block chain and are trying to introduce it, but it is a reality that they are hesitant because of high entry barriers.
GOB-Ledger提供BAAS服务平台为企业用户提供区块链相关服务。
GOB-Ledger offers a service-oriented blockchained platform (BaaS) to provide a service for partners to create blockchain-based services.
Tom Ku：我个人认为BAAS将会是区块链未来商业的一种形态。
Tom Ku：I personally believe BaaS is going to be mainstream business as blockchain is a software after all.
04
GOB平台的市场策略
Tom Ku：您的市场策略是什么？
Tom Ku：What's your go2market strategy?
Steve Kim：GOB是一家全球性的公司。
Steve Kim：GOB is a global company.
首先，我们正在努力支持韩国的各种dApp。我们正在提议科学、技术和信息部（NIPA）的任务，我们正在济州岛开展一个正如韩国的加密谷一样的旅游区块链项目。
First, we are trying to support various dApp in Korea.We are proposing the task of the Ministry of Science, Technology and Information (NIPA), and we are carrying out a tourism blockchain project in "Jeju Island" which is like the crypto valley of Korea.
我们还支持二手车区块链项目，支付区块链服务等。
We also support used-car blockchain projects, payment blockchain services, and so on.
此外，我们正在准备日本的区块链数字资产管理系统，欧洲（瑞典）国防区块链系统，公共业务项目和新加坡区块链项目部。
In addition, we are preparing for Japan's Block Chain Digital Asset Management System, Europe (Sweden) Defense Blockchain System, Public Business Project, and Singapore Department of Block Chain Project.
Tom Ku：我喜欢你们项目在公开与私人以及全球方面的平衡。
Tom Ku：I like the balance between public, private and global aspects of your current business.
Steve Kim：我们正在全球布局公链与私有链服务。
Steve Kim：Yes I’m trying public and private blockchain service in Global.
Tom Ku：我认为GOB一定已经募资十分顺利，请告诉我项目之前和现在的融资情况如何？
Tom Ku：I think a project like GOB must have raised good investment so far. Tell me about your past and current fund-raising status please.
Steve Kim：2018年2月到8月我们向种子投资者募资。此外，我们也从风投中获得了一部分资金。我们现在凑集到的资金额约为2100万美元。
Steve Kim：We had seed investors from February to August 2018. We also attract funding from VCs. At the time, the funding amount is about $21M.
05
GOB平台的IEO策略
Tom Ku：GOB IEO策略是什么，即您计划筹集的金额以及您将采取哪些措施来增加GOB代币的价值？
Tom Ku：Steve, what is GOB's IEO strategy, that is, what actions you will take to increase the GOB token value?
Steve Kim：GOB与各种dApp公司保持着良好的关系以增加其代币的价值，并允许他们通过现实合同交换代币。
Steve Kim：GOB connects to various dApp companies to increase the value of their tokens, and also allows them to exchange tokens through real-life contracts.
此外，通过除公链之外的私有链业务，它提高了内部技术的价值并使公司获利。
In addition, through the business of a private block chain other than public blockchain, it raises the value of the internal technology and makes profit of the company.
Tom Ku：没错，毕竟公司本身的表现是最重要的。
Tom Ku：right, after all, the performance of the company is most important!
Steve Kim：未来我们还将通过积极做市，向代币持有者空投分配利润以及每年销毁一定数量的代币来保证代币价格。
Steve Kim：In the future, we will also defend the token price by active market-making, distribution of profits to the token holders through airdrops, and burning certain amount of tokens yearly.
Tom Ku：没错，保证代币的稀缺性是提升币价和价值最重要的方式。
Tom Ku：Agreed. Keeping the token's scarcity is most important to hold up the price and increase the value.
06
GOB的团队及其他项目
Tom Ku：请介绍一下你的项目团队，他们有什么闪光点？
Tom Ku：Hey Steve, I think I asked too much questions about your technology and business side. Tell us about your team. What makes you proud of them?
Steve Kim：由于缺乏技术人才而难以开发，区块链很难应用于现实生活中。
Steve Kim：In the case of a block-chain business, it is difficult to apply it to real life because it is difficult to develop because of lack of technical talent.
然而，GOB的工程师团队拥有超过5至30年的技术经验优秀的软件工程师。他们有能力开发公链、主网，分发SDK。
However, GOB's engineer team has excellent software engineers with more than 5 to 30+ years of technology experience. They have the ability to develop a public blockchain, Mainnet and distribute SDK.
我们还有能力分析和商业化作为当前私有链首选方案Hyper Ledger Fabric。
We also have the ability to analyze and commercialize Hyper Ledger Fabric which is the current preferred option for private blockchains.
此外，我们在各个领域都有充足的顾问。可以说，我们是能够制定和领导最佳代币经济，卓越的技术和业务发展的少有的团队。
In addition, we have a wide range of advisors in various fields, and we can say that it is an uncommon team with the ability to make and lead an optimal token economy as well as superior technology and business development.
Tom Ku：很好，Steve你在汉阳大学和三星具备丰富的高科技经验，同时具备密码学博士学位，并担任兼职教授，技术十分强劲。
Tom Ku：Very good. Steve, you yourself have significant experience in high technology at Hyundai and Samsung, and also a phD in crytography, working as a part-time professor. Very solid team. That's important for a project's success.
Tom Ku：你提到过与韩国政府、瑞士、日本项目的合作，除此以外，请分享一下你们所取得的最大的成就。
Tom Ku：You've already mentioned about the proposals (or contracts) with the Korean government, Sweden and Japanese projects. Apart from these, please share the greatest achievements you have accumulated so far.
Steve Kim：感谢总结我们所取得的成就，接下来我来列举一下我们正在开发的一些私有与公有的项目。
Steve Kim：Ok Tom, thx for summarizing our achievements. Let me provide you with a list of private and public projects we're working on.
我们的私有链项目：
- 韩国科技部
- 韩国济州岛区块链项目
- 越南旅行区块链项目
- 中国农产品和水产品追踪区块链项目
- 中国房间共享区块链项目
- 历史管理区块链项目
- 二手车管理区块链项目
- 日本的数字安全区块链项目
- 中国艺术追踪区块链项目
- 首尔的太阳能区块链项目
- 音乐版权区块链项目
- 文凭区块链项目等
-  H / W应用Machin与IBM
-  H / W应用Machin与HP
-  H / W应用机械与Fusitsu
Our Private blockchain projects:
- Ministry of Science and Technology in Korea
- Jeju Island Blockchain Project in Korea
- Travel Blockchain Project in Vietnam
- Agricultural and Fishery Products Trace Blockchain Project in China
- Room Sharing Blockchain Project in China
- Historical Management Blockchain Project
- Used car management blockchain project
- Digital safe blockchain project in Japan
- Art Tracking Blockchain Project in China
- Solar blockchain project in Seoul
- Music copyright block chain project
- Diploma blockchain project etc.
- H/W Applicance Machin with IBM
- H/W Applicance Machin with HP
- H/W Applicance Machin with Fusitsu
我们的公有链项目：
-  dApp公司招募
-  SNS平台
- 碳信用额度
- 太阳能项目
-  房地产
- 游戏等
Next our Public Blockchain projects:
- Recruiting various dApp companies
- SNS platform
- Carbon credits
- Solar Project
-  Real estate
- Games, etc.
我尽可能讲的全面些，但可能有一些遗漏，如果您想了解更多有关GOB的信息，请访问gobplatform.io。
Ok Tom, I tried to be as comprehensive as possible, but there might be some omission. If you want to find out more about GOB, please visit gobplatform.io.
07
韩国政府支持区块链
网友：听说GOB要上交易所了，方便透露是哪个交易所么？
Q1：I would like to ask if it seems that Gob wants to go to the exchange to disclose which exchange is it?
Steve Kim：Coineal。
Steve Kim：Coineal。
网友：为什么你们选择做GOB？
Q2：Why do you choose to do GOB？
Steve Kim：为了使区块链开发更容易且可定制，实现跨链数据交换，并使dApp开发更为简单，使区块链能够更适用于大众。
Steve Kim：However, the most important motives were to make the blockchain development process easy and customizable, allow cross-chain data exchange between different chains, and turn the complicated dApp proces into an easy plug-and-play type structure. Cause only when these are realized, the blockchain will become an everyday, ubiquitous technology as it is supposed to become.
网友：GOB是有韩国政府背景么吗？目前韩国政府对数字货币的态度如何呢？
Q3：Is GOB supported by Korean Government? What's Korean government's attitude towards crypto?
Steve Kim：韩国政府不支持数字货币，但它支持区块链，因为它知道该技术的潜力。 这就是为什么GOB得到了韩国政府的极大兴趣。
Steve Kim：The Korean government doesn't support Crypto, but it supports Blockchain as it know the technology's potential. This is why GOB gets great interest from the Korean government. Also persuading a negative government depends on the project.
例如，我们非常积极地向政府提出建议，以便有效和透明地改变政府流程。 我相信这就是为什么我们得到政府的照顾，不仅在韩国，而且在全球范围内。
For instance, we are very active in making proposals to the government that would transform the government process efficient and transparent. I believe this is why we get a lot of love calls from the government, not only in Korea but globally.
本文经「原本」原创认证，作者
鸵鸟区块链
，访问yuanben.io查询【
2M2GLL5C
】获取授权信息。
content_html:
4月8日晚，猎云财经空中课堂第三十四期邀请到韩国公链GOB副董事长Steve Kim作为主讲人带来了新一期的线上分享。本次活动还特别邀请了BitBlock Capital顾问Tom Ku作为主持人。

Steve Kim，成均馆大学密码学博士，曾就职于现代汽车、三星S1、德勤咨询，担任大数据分析和区块链ICT与安全专家超过20年，并负责该领域众多大型项目。同时，他还担任首尔网络大学密码学的兼职教授。

Tom Ku，区块链投资专家、哥伦比亚大学MBA。曾就职于Ernst & Young担任金融顾问。曾创办MBA咨询与区块链KOL平台TomKu Video两家企业。他具备丰富的区块链项目商业模式咨询与投资经验。

以下为分享实录（经编辑整理）：

01

GOB平台是下一代区块链平台

Tom Ku：请介绍一下你自己以及GOB项目。

Tom Ku：Please introduce your CEO (Mr. Albert Kwon) and GOB.

Steve Kim：我是IT和信息安全专家，拥有成均馆大学信息安全和计算机科学硕士和博士学位。 在现代集团和三星集团担任IT和信息安全专家约20年。此外，我还获得了IT领域的各种认证，如CISA，CISSP，CISM，ITIL，PMP，ISO 27001，9001，22301和20000。

Steve Kim：I was the first generation of ICT in Korea, and established Internet portals such as Korea's portal site, Interpark Technology, and became an IPO and M & A expert.

我还是KISA（韩国互联网和安全局）、NIA（国家信息社会机构）、韩国中小医院协会、韩国中小护理协会的信息安全顾问。我的主要项目包括沙特ARAMCO、科威特KNPC、新加坡樟宜机场等海外项目。目前，我积极投身区块链项目，在区块链研究所GeoBlueLab的工作包括咨询、讲座和论文。

In addition, we are working as a management specialist who accumulates various M & A experiences through many projects such as construction, service, and IT. 

GOB平台是下一代区块链平台，旨在解决区块链平台之间服务和数据集成的困境，并提供了可以作为平台使用的生态系统。

GOB platform is the next-generation Blockchain platform that solves the dilemma of data integration and services between Blockchain platforms and provides an ecosystem that can be used as one platform.

GOB平台有两个可以将现有的区块链技术适用于现实世界的关键功能。

GOB Platform provides two key functions to transform the existing blockchain technology to be applicable in the real world.

首先，GOB主网是适应W3C数据标准的下一代区块链，拥有出色的传输速度，为dApp用户提供自动化工具和引擎，帮助他们轻松使用区块链。

First, we provide GOB Mainnet, the next generation bockchain accomodating W3C data standard with exceptional transfer speed and providing automated tools and engines for dApp users to easily use the blockchain.

其次，我们提供一个集成的通用区块链中心，可以在不同的区块链平台之间交换数据，也可以在各种服务中实现。

Second, we provide an integrated universal Blockchain Hub that can exchange data among different blockchain platforms, which can be implemented in various services.

02

GOB平台的最终目标

Tom Ku：你对GOB的期许是什么？你的想法来自于何处？

Tom Ku：So Steve, what was the motive for GOB?How did you come up with the idea?

Steve Kim：自区块链技术出现以来，许多个人和公司对其未来感兴趣。 但是开发区块链和主网络绝非易事。

Steve Kim：Ever since the introduction of blockchain technology, many companies and individuals have interest in the future of the blockchain. But many realize that developing a blockchain and mainnet is never easy.

设计区块链网络，上币，运行测试网络以及完成主网的开发存在很多障碍。

There are so many barriers to designing blockchain networks, listing coins, running testnet, and completing the development of the Mainnet.

客户可以购买他们已经创建的区块链平台，并对其定制化以适应其在公共或私有链中的使用，并购买定制的区块链平台来运行他们自己的“dApp商店”。 这是GOB区块链平台的最终目标。

Clients can purchase the blockchain platform that they have already created, and customize to fit its use in public or private blockchain, and purchase a customized blockchain platform to run their own 'dApp store'. This is the ultimate goal of the GOB blockchain platform.

Tom Ku：基于区块链的便捷开发是未来dApp的解决方案。

Tom Ku：Yeah, I agree. Easy creation of blockchain as a software and plug-and-play solutions for dApps are the future.

03

GOB平台的三大特征

Tom Ku：市场上存在有许多类似的平台，您认为GOB的三大主要差异因素是什么？

Tom Ku：However, Steve, there are a number of similar platforms being developed. Having said this, what do you think are the THREE major differentiation factors of GOB?

Steve Kim：GOB平台有三大特征，主网支持SDK、GOB-Portal和GOB Ledger。

Steve Kim：There are three main features of the GOB platform. Main net release supporting SDK、GOB-Portal and GOB-Ledger.

1)GOB 主网上线

1) GOB - Main net release

GOB主网是一个独立的区块链平台，通过丰富的平台配套体系支持用户构建准确的仪表盘，进行交易与建立可扩展的dApp生态。

GOB Mainnet is an independent block-chain platform that enables you to build accurate dashboards and transactions and build scalable dApp ecosystems with a variety of platform-provided features.

GOB DEV Center开发并分发SDKs以构建基础开发环境，以供开发者开发各自的dApp. DApp开发者与终端用户通过使用与获取通证，发展整体生态系统。

The GOB DEV Center develops and distributes SDKs to provide the environment for dApp creators to develop their own dApp. DApp developers and end users co-exist and grow their ecosystem through the consumption and acquisition of coins.

2)GOB Portal

2)GOB-Portal

dApp开发者与用户可以在GOB Portal网站上进行交互。

On the GOB-Portal website, the interaction between dApp developers and users takes place.

GOB Portal提供SDK与API以支持开发者便捷快速地开发dApp。平台配有dApp开发的基本组件与模版，用户可通过自动化工具创建dApp模版，模版可存储于存储库中共享，使用的用户越多，则开发者可获得通证越多。

It provides SDK and API to easily develop dApp, creates template of dApp using wigwig tool directly on the web, and the created template form is stored in the repository and shared, and the more users, the bigger reward is given.

3)GOB Ledger

3)GOB-Ledger

许多企业开始认识到区块链的优势，并尝试引入区块链与业务相结合。但由于区块链技术本身的高壁垒导致其对于是否进入该市场显得犹豫。

Many companies are aware of the advantages of a block chain and are trying to introduce it, but it is a reality that they are hesitant because of high entry barriers.

GOB-Ledger提供BAAS服务平台为企业用户提供区块链相关服务。

GOB-Ledger offers a service-oriented blockchained platform (BaaS) to provide a service for partners to create blockchain-based services.

Tom Ku：我个人认为BAAS将会是区块链未来商业的一种形态。

Tom Ku：I personally believe BaaS is going to be mainstream business as blockchain is a software after all.

GOB平台的市场策略

Tom Ku：您的市场策略是什么？

Tom Ku：What's your go2market strategy?

Steve Kim：GOB是一家全球性的公司。

Steve Kim：GOB is a global company.

首先，我们正在努力支持韩国的各种dApp。我们正在提议科学、技术和信息部（NIPA）的任务，我们正在济州岛开展一个正如韩国的加密谷一样的旅游区块链项目。

First, we are trying to support various dApp in Korea.We are proposing the task of the Ministry of Science, Technology and Information (NIPA), and we are carrying out a tourism blockchain project in "Jeju Island" which is like the crypto valley of Korea.

我们还支持二手车区块链项目，支付区块链服务等。

We also support used-car blockchain projects, payment blockchain services, and so on.

此外，我们正在准备日本的区块链数字资产管理系统，欧洲（瑞典）国防区块链系统，公共业务项目和新加坡区块链项目部。

In addition, we are preparing for Japan's Block Chain Digital Asset Management System, Europe (Sweden) Defense Blockchain System, Public Business Project, and Singapore Department of Block Chain Project.

Tom Ku：我喜欢你们项目在公开与私人以及全球方面的平衡。

Tom Ku：I like the balance between public, private and global aspects of your current business.

Steve Kim：我们正在全球布局公链与私有链服务。

Steve Kim：Yes I’m trying public and private blockchain service in Global.

Tom Ku：我认为GOB一定已经募资十分顺利，请告诉我项目之前和现在的融资情况如何？

Tom Ku：I think a project like GOB must have raised good investment so far. Tell me about your past and current fund-raising status please.

Steve Kim：2018年2月到8月我们向种子投资者募资。此外，我们也从风投中获得了一部分资金。我们现在凑集到的资金额约为2100万美元。

Steve Kim：We had seed investors from February to August 2018. We also attract funding from VCs. At the time, the funding amount is about $21M.

05

GOB平台的IEO策略

Tom Ku：GOB IEO策略是什么，即您计划筹集的金额以及您将采取哪些措施来增加GOB代币的价值？

Tom Ku：Steve, what is GOB's IEO strategy, that is, what actions you will take to increase the GOB token value?

Steve Kim：GOB与各种dApp公司保持着良好的关系以增加其代币的价值，并允许他们通过现实合同交换代币。

Steve Kim：GOB connects to various dApp companies to increase the value of their tokens, and also allows them to exchange tokens through real-life contracts.

此外，通过除公链之外的私有链业务，它提高了内部技术的价值并使公司获利。

In addition, through the business of a private block chain other than public blockchain, it raises the value of the internal technology and makes profit of the company.

Tom Ku：没错，毕竟公司本身的表现是最重要的。

Tom Ku：right, after all, the performance of the company is most important!

Steve Kim：未来我们还将通过积极做市，向代币持有者空投分配利润以及每年销毁一定数量的代币来保证代币价格。

Steve Kim：In the future, we will also defend the token price by active market-making, distribution of profits to the token holders through airdrops, and burning certain amount of tokens yearly.

Tom Ku：没错，保证代币的稀缺性是提升币价和价值最重要的方式。

Tom Ku：Agreed. Keeping the token's scarcity is most important to hold up the price and increase the value.

07

韩国政府支持区块链

网友：听说GOB要上交易所了，方便透露是哪个交易所么？

Q1：I would like to ask if it seems that Gob wants to go to the exchange to disclose which exchange is it?

Steve Kim：Coineal。

Steve Kim：Coineal。

网友：为什么你们选择做GOB？

Q2：Why do you choose to do GOB？

Steve Kim：为了使区块链开发更容易且可定制，实现跨链数据交换，并使dApp开发更为简单，使区块链能够更适用于大众。

Steve Kim：However, the most important motives were to make the blockchain development process easy and customizable, allow cross-chain data exchange between different chains, and turn the complicated dApp proces into an easy plug-and-play type structure. Cause only when these are realized, the blockchain will become an everyday, ubiquitous technology as it is supposed to become.

网友：GOB是有韩国政府背景么吗？目前韩国政府对数字货币的态度如何呢？

Q3：Is GOB supported by Korean Government? What's Korean government's attitude towards crypto?

Steve Kim：韩国政府不支持数字货币，但它支持区块链，因为它知道该技术的潜力。 这就是为什么GOB得到了韩国政府的极大兴趣。

Steve Kim：The Korean government doesn't support Crypto, but it supports Blockchain as it know the technology's potential. This is why GOB gets great interest from the Korean government. Also persuading a negative government depends on the project. 

例如，我们非常积极地向政府提出建议，以便有效和透明地改变政府流程。 我相信这就是为什么我们得到政府的照顾，不仅在韩国，而且在全球范围内。

For instance, we are very active in making proposals to the government that would transform the government process efficient and transparent. I believe this is why we get a lot of love calls from the government, not only in Korea but globally.
